Entries.Text: Annotation Language
Determines the language used for meta annotations (i.e. community field names).
Row Import Language
Determines the language used for community row imports.
Enable Compact Presentation
If enabled, the line height between elements is reduced, allow more params, rows and fields to be visible.
Enable Data Table Cell Borders
If enabled, data table cells will be given borders.
Enable Loose Param Mode
If enabled, loose .param files will be considered during the param loading and saving processes.
Enable Loose Param Repack
If enabled, any loose .param files will be repacked into the enc_regulation.bin
Enable Loose Param Mode
If enabled, loose .param files will be considered during the param loading and saving processes.
Strip Row Names on Save
If enabled, row names are stripped upon save, meaning no row names will be stored within the regulation.
Strip Row Names on Save
If enabled, row names are stripped upon save, meaning no row names will be stored within the regulation.
Strip Row Names on Save
If enabled, row names are stripped upon save, meaning no row names will be stored within the regulation.
Strip Row Names on Save
If enabled, row names are stripped upon save, meaning no row names will be stored within the regulation.
Strip Row Names on Save
If enabled, row names are stripped upon save, meaning no row names will be stored within the regulation.
Strip Row Names on Save
If enabled, row names are stripped upon save, meaning no row names will be stored within the regulation.
Strip Row Names on Save
If enabled, row names are stripped upon save, meaning no row names will be stored within the regulation.
Strip Row Names on Save
If enabled, row names are stripped upon save, meaning no row names will be stored within the regulation.
Strip Row Names on Save
If enabled, row names are stripped upon save, meaning no row names will be stored within the regulation.
Restore Row Names on Load
If enabled, and stripped row names have been stored, row names will be re-apply upon loading.
Restore Row Names on Load
If enabled, and stripped row names have been stored, row names will be re-apply upon loading.
Restore Row Names on Load
If enabled, and stripped row names have been stored, row names will be re-apply upon loading.
Restore Row Names on Load
If enabled, and stripped row names have been stored, row names will be re-apply upon loading.
Restore Row Names on Load
If enabled, and stripped row names have been stored, row names will be re-apply upon loading.
Restore Row Names on Load
If enabled, and stripped row names have been stored, row names will be re-apply upon loading.
Restore Row Names on Load
If enabled, and stripped row names have been stored, row names will be re-apply upon loading.
Restore Row Names on Load
If enabled, and stripped row names have been stored, row names will be re-apply upon loading.
Restore Row Names on Load
If enabled, and stripped row names have been stored, row names will be re-apply upon loading.
Param Save Compression
Determine which form of DCX compression to apply to the saved regulation file.
Automatically Use Latest
If enabled, the param reloader version will be set to the latest executable version whenever Smithbox is started.
Param Reloader Version
This should match the executable version you wish to target, otherwise the memory offsets will be incorrect.
Always Display Pinned Entries
If enabled, pinned param entries will always be visible at the top of the list, even when scrolling.
Sort List Alphabetically
If enabled, the param list will be sorted alphabetically.
Display Community Names
If enabled, community names will be used instead of the raw filename.
Display Categories
If enabled, the params will be grouped into collapsible categories.
Always Display Pinned Entries
If enabled, pinned row entries will always be visible at the top of the list, even when scrolling.
Enable Row Name Word-Wrap
If enabled, the row names will be word-wrapped.
Enable Row Grouping for Item Lots
If enabled, the rows within Item Lot params will be grouped.
Display Decorators
If enabled, the row decorators are displayed.
Display Base over DLC entries for Row FMG Text
If enabled, FMG entries from the base FMG will be preferred over those of the DLC1/DLC2 FMG.
Always Display Pinned Entries
If enabled, pinned field entries will always be visible at the top of the list, even when scrolling.
Enable Field Rearrangement
If enabled, fields will be re-arranged according to the grouping arrangement specified in the Param Meta file.
Field Name Mode

Determines how the field naming is displayed.
Source is the original param definition name.
Community is a more readable and descriptive name.
Display Offsets
If enabled, the data offset for a field will be displayed.
Display Color Picker
If enabled, a color picker is displayed (when suitable for the field).
Display Graph
If enabled, a graph is displayed (when suitable for the field).
Display Map Link
If enabled, a map link button is displayed (when suitable for the field).
Display Model Link
If enabled, a model link button is displayed (when suitable for the field).
Display Padding
If enabled, padding fields are displayed.
Display Decorators
If enabled, field decorators are displayed.
Display References
If enabled, field references are displayed.
Display Enums
If enabled, field enums are displayed.
Display Attributes
If enabled, field attributes are displayed in the tooltip.
Display Icon Preview
If enabled, a referenced icon will be displayed visually by the field.
Icon Preview Scale
The image scale of the icon preview.
Field Tooltip Mode
Determines how the field tooltip is shown.
Display Group Reference Community Names
If enabled, group references will use community name labels.
Enable Field Layouts
If enabled, fields will be arranged based on field layout data (if applicable).
Enable Group Names
If enabled, the grouping headers will have names.
Enable Chance Hints
If enabled, the chance percentages for item lots will be displayed.
Field Layout Mode
Determines how the field layouts are displayed.
Unsorted Field Placement
Determines where the unsorted fields are placed when Field Layouts are active.
Display Traditional Percentages
If enabled, fields that represent a percentage will be displayed in a normal fashion, with the value representing the percentage. Typically, the value in represented as 1 - <value>.
Display Row Name Input
If enabled, display the row name input box within the context menu.
Display Shortcut Tools
If enabled, display the shortcut tools within the context menu.
Display Pin Options
If enabled, display the pin options within the context menu.
Display Comparison Options
If enabled, display the comparison options within the context menu.
Display Reverse Lookup Tool
If enabled, display the reverse lookup tool within the context menu.
Display Proliferate Name Tool
If enabled, display the proliferate name tool within the context menu.
Display Inherit Name Tool
If enabled, display the inherit name tool within the context menu.
Display Row Name Tools
If enabled, display the row name tools within the context menu.
Display Field Name
If enabled, the field name is displayed in the context menu.
Display Field Description
If enabled, the field description is displayed in the context menu.
Display Field Attributes
If enabled, the field attributes are displayed in the context menu.
Display Field Pin Options
If enabled, the field pin options are displayed in the context menu.
Display Field Comparison Options
If enabled, the field comparison options are displayed in the context menu.
Display Field Value Distribution
If enabled, the field value distribution tool is displayed in the context menu.
Display Field Searchbar Options
If enabled, the field searchbar options are displayed in the context menu.
Display Field References
If enabled, the field references are displayed in the context menu.
Display Field Reference Search
If enabled, the field reference search tool is displayed in the context menu.
Display Advanced Commands in Auto-fill
If enabled, more complex commands are visible in the auto-fill menu.
Enable Param Meta Override
If enabled, the Param Editor will use the Param META local to your project's .smithbox folder, instead of the base version.
Enable Param Enum Addition
If enabled, the Param Editor will add param enums from your project's .smithbox folder alongside the base versions.
Enable Param Enum Override
If enabled, the Param Editor will use the Param Enums local to your project's .smithbox folder, instead of the base version.
Enable Param Category Addition
If enabled, the Param Editor will add param categories from your project's .smithbox folder alongside the base versions.
Enable Param Category Override
If enabled, the Param Editor will only use param categories from your project's .smithbox folder, and ignore the base versions.
Enable Param Commutativity Group Addition
If enabled, the Param Editor will add param commutativity groups from your project's .smithbox folder alongside the base versions.
Enable Param Commutativity Override
If enabled, the Param Editor will only use param commutativity groups from your project's .smithbox folder, and ignore the base versions.
Enable Param Field Reference Group Addition
If enabled, the Param Editor will add param field reference groups from your project's .smithbox folder alongside the base versions.
Enable Param Field Reference Group Override
If enabled, the Param Editor will only use param field reference groups from your project's .smithbox folder, and ignore the base versions.
Enable Param Field Layout Addition
If enabled, the Param Editor will add param field layouts from your project's .smithbox folder alongside the base versions.
Enable Param Field Layout Override
If enabled, the Param Editor will only use param field layouts from your project's .smithbox folder, and ignore the base versions.
Enable Param Icon Configuration Addition
If enabled, the Param Editor will add param icon configurations from your project's .smithbox folder alongside the base versions.
Enable Param Icon Configuration Override
If enabled, the Param Editor will only use param icon configurations from your project's .smithbox folder, and ignore the base versions.
Enable Param Graph Annotation Addition
If enabled, the Param Editor will add param graph annotations from your project's .smithbox folder alongside the base versions.
Enable Param Graph Annotation Override
If enabled, the Param Editor will only use param graph annotations from your project's .smithbox folder, and ignore the base versions.
